Bush and several military ships in its group. 🔹 By the end of the month, another 4,200 troops are expected to arrive, represented by the "Boxer Amphibious Ready Group" and the 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit. 🔹 These forces will join nearly 50,000 military personnel who, according to the Pentagon, are involved in operations against Iran. Visioner 🇺🇦 A group from the 8th Regiment of Ukraine's Special Operations Forces (SSO) thwarted an attempt by the occupiers to break through the rear of the Ukrainian Defense Forces. Two Russians managed to penetrate beyond the front lines, but their movement was promptly detected by aerial reconnaissance. During the clearing of the building, the operators forced one occupier to surrender without a fight. ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan : An Israeli source confirmed that advanced contacts are under way for a temporary ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah, which could take effect in the coming days. Israel is not ruling out a U.S. request for a temporary truce in exchange for a commitment to resume fighting if no deal is reached with Iran, and as long as Hezbollah fire stops. The security cabinet is meeting now, with many ministers opposed. The U.S. request was raised during ambassador‑level talks in Washington. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "Yesterday in Bint Jbeil a cell of 3 Hezbullah fighters successfully clashed with a large Israeli unit from the elite paratroopers unitThey successfully shot and injured 10 Israeli soldiers, including many seriously and moderately. The whole unit was placed on the ground" Hezbullah gives details of the event: IED and gunfire في إطار التصدّي لمحاولة توغّل جيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ في مدينة بنت جبيل، وأثناء محاولة قوّة من الكتيبة 101، لواء المظليين، التقدّم من بلدة مارون الراس باتجاه الأحياء الجنوبيّة الغربيّة لمدينة بنت جبيل فجر الثلاثاء 14-04-2026 ، وعند وصول القوّة إلى نقطة المقتل في كمين معدّ مسبقًا، فجّر المجاهدون عبوّة ناسفة فيها، ثم خاضوا اشتباكًا معها من مسافة صفر بالأسلحة الخفيفة والمتوسّطة ما أسفر عن وقوع أفرادها بين قتيل وجريح. عمد جيش العدو إلى سحب الإصابات من منطقة المكمن تحت غطاء ناريّ ودخانيّ كثيف باتّجاه بلدة مارون الراس ومنها إلى الداخل الفلسطينيّ المحتلّ باستعمال المروحيّات، في المقابل استهدفت مدفعيّة المقاومة منطقة الإخلاء بالصواريخ والقذائف المدفعيّة. إنّ هذا الردّ سيستمرّ إلى أن يتوقّف العدوان الإسرائيليّ الأمريكيّ على بلدنا وشعبنا. ﴿وَمَا النَّصْرُ إِلاَّ مِنْ عِندِ اللّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيم﴾‏ الأربعاء 15-04-2026 ‏ 26 شوال 1447 هـ

🇺🇦 Budanov continues to make statements that contradict Zelensky's official line Today the head of the Presidential Office stated that the return of Ukrainians from abroad is only possible if there are real security guarantees and economic conditions. "No one will return just because. People are waiting for real security guarantees and economic grounds," he noted. According to him, the country needs to develop a high-value-added economy to create conditions for the return of citizens. Zelensky recently stated in Germany that conscripted Ukrainians should be returned from abroad to be sent to the front. Budanov also made it clear that he is against the mobilization of women, which has been increasingly discussed lately. "While some men are fighting and working, and others are hiding or have gone abroad - it is women who have taken on responsibility and become the foundation that sustains our rear and economy. And this is confirmed by the figures," he said. Earlier Budanov spoke against pressure on the UOC. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

A surviving Iranian F-4 Phantom II jet escorted the aircraft carrying Pakistan’s Chief of Army Staff, Asim Munir, who arrived in Tehran today for discussions on the second round of U.S.–Iran negotiations.

WSJ: After the killing of Ali Khamenei, power in Iran has moved not toward moderation but toward more extreme hard-liners. His son, Mojtaba Khamenei, now leads a system increasingly dominated by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. Instead of opening space for compromise, the war strengthened radical factions. These leaders are more repressive at home—cracking down on dissent—and more aggressive abroad, showing little interest in diplomacy. Key figures in the new leadership, including Ahmad Vahidi and Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr, have histories of violence and strong anti-West views.
